initSetup(bytes4[],address[]).details: only use this function if service list is too long for a single call, otherwise use `initialize`. This function is only callable by the deployer

register(bytes4).details: only contract deployed by deployer can self-register during initialization

setAddress(bytes4,address).details: only migrator can set new implementation addresses

Initialized().notice: emitted when the registry is initialized

SetAddress(bytes4,address).notice: emitted when a new service is registered

SetUp(bytes4[],address[]).notice: emitted when the registry is set up

SetVersion(uint64).notice: emitted when the system version is updated

getAddress(bytes4).notice: get current implementation address for a service

initSetup(bytes4[],address[]).notice: Initialize the registry with the given services and implementations

initialize(bytes4[],address[]).notice: Initialize the registry with the given services and implementations

register(bytes4).notice: register the caller as a new service

setAddress(bytes4,address).notice: set new implementation address for a service
